content.text: Apply bugfix-5: Resolved all findings from the delivery acceptance audit: added missing order lifecycle domain, hardened inventory row-locking, replaced heuristic KPI materialization with actual transactional data, extended at-rest encryption to wallet monetary fields, enforced bcrypt-only password hashing, added audit trail query endpoints, implemented automatic QR rotation, and fixed documentation inconsistencies.

Resolved all findings from the delivery acceptance audit: added missing order lifecycle domain, hardened inventory row-locking, replaced heuristic KPI materialization with actual transactional data, extended at-rest encryption to wallet monetary fields, enforced bcrypt-only password hashing, added audit trail query endpoints, implemented automatic QR rotation, and fixed documentation inconsistencies.

Changes applied:
### Order lifecycle domain (Blocker)
- Added Order and OrderLine models with status state machine: created → reserved → completed | cancelled.
- Order reservation transactionally creates inventory reservations for each line; completion and cancellation release them.
- Added RBAC-gated REST endpoints: POST /orders, /orders/reserve, /orders/complete, /orders/cancel, GET /orders, /orders/{ref}.
- Added Alembic migration 20260403_0012 for orders and order_lines tables.
Files: repo/backend/app/db/models/orders.py, repo/backend/app/schemas/orders.py, repo/backend/app/services/order_service.py, repo/backend/app/api/v1/endpoints/orders.py, repo/backend/app/api/v1/router.py, repo/backend/app/db/models/__init__.py, repo/backend/alembic/versions/20260403_0012_orders_lifecycle.py

### Inventory row-locking for transfer and count paths (High)
- Added SELECT ... FOR UPDATE on inventory_ledger rows before reading position totals in post_transfer and post_count.
- This serializes concurrent transfer/count operations on the same item/location, matching the existing reservation locking strategy.
- Added PostgreSQL concurrent transfer locking test to verify only one of two simultaneous 4-unit transfers from a 5-unit source succeeds.
Files: repo/backend/app/services/inventory_service.py, repo/backend/tests/test_postgres_locking.py

### KPI materialization traceability (High)
- Removed synthetic _base_attempts formula and _store_from_order_reference heuristic string-parsing function.
- KPI conversion/AOV now counts total_attempts from actual CouponRedemptionEvent rows and uses explicit store_id from each event.
- Inventory turnover uses row.store_id directly instead of falling back to location_id.
Files: repo/backend/app/services/kpi_service.py

### At-rest encryption for wallet monetary fields (High)
- Added _encrypt_amount and _decrypt_amount helpers in loyalty_service.py.
- Wallet credit/debit operations now decrypt balance before arithmetic and write back the updated value.
- Wallet ledger balance_after field uses decrypted balance.
- Member view service handles encrypted wallet balance when building responses.
Files: repo/backend/app/services/loyalty_service.py, repo/backend/app/services/member_view_service.py

### bcrypt-only password hashing (High)
- Changed bcrypt from conditional try/import to hard import — no PBKDF2 fallback in any environment.
- assert_password_hashing_backend_ready is now a no-op (bcrypt availability is enforced at import time).
- Updated existing auth tests that expected RuntimeError from the removed conditional logic.
Files: repo/backend/app/core/security.py, repo/backend/tests/test_auth_security.py

### Documentation consistency and partial-scope removal (High)
- Fixed frontend README paths from fullstack/ to repo/ (docker-compose.yml references).
- Rewrote docs/design.md: removed 'partial' delivery declarations, updated topology paths, added order lifecycle and encryption coverage sections, and added a requirement traceability matrix.
Files: repo/frontend/README.md, docs/design.md

### Automatic QR token rotation in attendance UI (Medium)
- Added Start/Stop Auto-Rotation button that fires rotateAttendanceQr every 30 seconds.
- Added countdown timer showing seconds until current token expires.
- Intervals and countdown are cleaned up on component unmount.
Files: repo/frontend/src/views/app/AttendanceView.vue

### Audit trail query endpoints for loyalty/campaign/order (Medium)
- Added /audit/events with optional resource_type and action prefix filters.
- Added /audit/events/member for member/loyalty/wallet audit events with optional member_code filter.
- Added /audit/events/campaign for campaign/coupon audit events.
- Added /audit/events/order for order lifecycle audit events.
- All endpoints are role-gated to administrator and store_manager.
Files: repo/backend/app/api/v1/endpoints/audit.py, repo/backend/app/api/v1/router.py

### Analytics dashboard real refund/cost data (Medium)
- Added refund_total and cost_total columns to kpi_daily_metrics via migration 20260403_0011.
- Updated analytics _build_rows to read refund_total and cost_total from KPI metrics instead of hardcoding zeros.
- gross_margin now computed as revenue - refunds - cost.
Files: repo/backend/app/db/models/kpi.py, repo/backend/app/services/analytics_service.py, repo/backend/alembic/versions/20260403_0011_kpi_refund_cost_columns.py

Tests added:
- repo/backend/tests/test_order_lifecycle.py::test_order_create
- repo/backend/tests/test_order_lifecycle.py::test_order_duplicate_reference_rejected
- repo/backend/tests/test_order_lifecycle.py::test_order_reserve_creates_inventory_reservation
- repo/backend/tests/test_order_lifecycle.py::test_order_complete_releases_reservation
- repo/backend/tests/test_order_lifecycle.py::test_order_cancel_from_reserved
- repo/backend/tests/test_order_lifecycle.py::test_order_cancel_from_created
- repo/backend/tests/test_order_lifecycle.py::test_order_invalid_transition_rejected
- repo/backend/tests/test_order_lifecycle.py::test_order_list
- repo/backend/tests/test_order_lifecycle.py::test_order_detail
- repo/backend/tests/test_order_lifecycle.py::test_order_role_protection
- repo/backend/tests/test_order_lifecycle.py::test_order_reserve_insufficient_stock
- repo/backend/tests/test_security_hardening.py::test_bcrypt_only_hash_produces_bcrypt_prefix
- repo/backend/tests/test_security_hardening.py::test_bcrypt_verify_correct_password
- repo/backend/tests/test_security_hardening.py::test_bcrypt_verify_wrong_password
- repo/backend/tests/test_security_hardening.py::test_bcrypt_module_is_available
- repo/backend/tests/test_security_hardening.py::test_audit_events_endpoint_requires_auth
- repo/backend/tests/test_security_hardening.py::test_audit_events_endpoint_requires_manager_role

- repo/backend/tests/test_security_hardening.py::test_audit_events_filter_by_action
